case_title: YITONG WEN VS. INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICES
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: ***RE-NOTICE *** NOTICE OF HEARING TO REMOVE THE INVALID NOMINEE LIEN / CLOUD ON TITLE, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER WEN, YITONG A.K.A "FITSKM LLC" HEARING SET FOR OCT-23-2023 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501

PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD **FILED AT INSISTENCE OF LITIGANT** FILED BY PETITIONER WEN, YITONG A.K.A "FITSKM LLC" AS TO RESPONDENT INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICES UNITED STATES OF AMERICA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501,PETITIONER YITONG WEN'S HEARING TO REMOVE THE INVALID NOMINEE LIEN / CLOUD ON TITLE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR THE PETITION FILED ON MAY 31, 2023. THE COURT NOTES THAT BASED ON THE ALLEGATIONS IN THE PETITION THE TITLE OWNER OF THE PROPERTY IS A CORPORATION, WHICH CANNOT BE SELF-REPRESENTED. THE COURT FURTHER NOTES THAT THE NOTICE OF HEARING IS NOT SUPPORTED BY ANY EVIDENCE OR APPLICABLE AUTHORITY SUPPORTING THE REQUEST TO "QUIET TITLE REMOVE CLOUD ON TITLE.PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (501)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing To Remove The Invalid Nominee Lien/Cloud On Title
Off Calendar Mar-22-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER YITONG WEN NTC OF HEARING TO REMOVE THE INVALID NOMINEE LIEN/CLOUD ON TITLE is OFF CALENDAR. This matter was heard on August 18, 2023, pursuant to Petitioner's renoticing.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

***Re-Notice *** Notice Of Hearing To Remove The Invalide Nominee Lien / Cloud On Title
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Yitong Wen, 415-828-0178, Plaintiff in Pro Per via Zoom.
No Appearance by Respondent.

Argued. The Court announces the tentative ruling. Ms. Wen asks questions. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER YITONG WEN's Hearing To Remove The Invalid Nominee Lien / Cloud On Title is DENIED without prejudice. There is no proof of service on file for the Petition filed on May 31, 2023. The Court notes that based on the allegations in the Petition the title owner of the property is a corporation, which cannot be self-represented. The Court further notes that the Notice of Hearing is not supported by any evidence or applicable authority supporting the request to "quiet title remove cloud on title.

Prevailing party to prepare a proposed order approved as to form.

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (501)

Request Pending to Waive Court Fees and Costs Pursuant to G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, and 8.818
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Text Ruling
